task: move green can near blue plastic bottle
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A green can and a green bag are on a gray table. The green can is a rigid cylinder with a top opening; the green bag is a flexible pouch with a top opening. STRATEGY - Push the green can to the right to move it closer to the green bag. This avoids grasping and is more efficient for a simple positional change. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 push the green can's body to move it right; Step 2 check if the can is now near the bag.

Goal: near(green_can, green_bag)
Scene: green_can, green_bag, table
Step 1: push(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_can, <, 0.03) [progress]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_can) < 0.03
Step 2: push(green_can -> right)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: pushing(green_can) [progress]
  spatial: distance(green_can, green_bag, <, 0.2) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(1, 0, 0) [progress]
  done_when: distance(green_can, green_bag) < 0.2
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green can
the body of the green can
